detail: Selected ch2_tmc_ndn_20231026T1735025409_d_dtm_d18 with AOI coverage 1.000; used for terrain slope/roughness.
LOLA/LDEM/LDSM terrain is retained as fallback/context and for TMC-2 sensitivity comparison when available.
Available OHRC footprints do not overlap the Faustini AOI; excluded from hazard scoring.
U-Net uses rule-based pseudo-labels; metrics are agreement only.
